tool_args.label: Staff Summary - Ninth MOU between MNR and City of Newburgh
tool_args.raw_text: Staff Summary - Metro-North Railroad - Ninth Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) between MNR and City of Newburgh for Reimbursement of Ferry Landing/Parking Lease - Date December 9, 2022

payload.description: Staff Summary for Metro-North Railroad seeking MTA Board approval for a Ninth Memorandum of Understanding with the City of Newburgh for reimbursement of ferry landing/parking lease payments
payload.title: Ninth Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) between MNR and City of Newburgh for Reimbursement of Ferry Landing/Parking Lease

warnings: source.source_name is accepted as passthrough, but prefer title. Source name label.

source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad (MNR)
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad - The legal name of MTA Metro-North Railroad is Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company

tool_args.label: Ninth MOU - MNR/City of Newburgh Ferry Lease Reimbursement
tool_args.raw_text: Ninth Memorandum of Understanding (Ninth MOU) with the City of Newburgh, New York for Metro-North to reimburse the City for lease payments for the parking and ferry landing facilities used by the Newburgh-Beacon ferry for the period January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2023

payload.description: Ninth Memorandum of Understanding between Metro-North Railroad and the City of Newburgh for Metro-North to reimburse the City for lease payments for parking and ferry landing facilities used by the Newburgh-Beacon ferry for the period January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2023 at $21,916 per month
payload.project_name: Ninth Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) between MNR and City of Newburgh for Reimbursement of Ferry Landing/Parking Lease

tool_args.label: Newburgh-Beacon Ferry Service
tool_args.raw_text: Newburgh-Beacon ferry - the mooring, docking, and use of facilities in Newburgh to be used for the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry

payload.description: Ferry service connecting Newburgh and Beacon, New York, using mooring, docking, and parking facilities leased by the City of Newburgh from a private landowner, with Metro-North reimbursing the City for lease payments

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Mtg. 12/21/22

payload.description: MTA Board meeting at which approval for Metro-North to enter into the Ninth MOU with the City of Newburgh was to be sought

evidence_refs.source_quote: M-N Comm. Mtg. 12/19/22 MTA Board Mtg. 12/21/22

tool_args.label: First MOU between MNR and City of Newburgh - May 26, 2015
tool_args.raw_text: Under an MOU dated May 26, 2015, between Metro-North and the City, Metro-North reimbursed the City for lease payments from May through December 2015, at the monthly rate of $21,278.

payload.description: First Memorandum of Understanding between Metro-North and the City of Newburgh for Metro-North to reimburse the City for lease payments from May through December 2015 at $21,278 per month

evidence_refs.source_quote: first MOU dated May 26, 2015

tool_args.label: Original MNR/City of Newburgh Ferry Agreement - August 2004
tool_args.raw_text: In August 2004, Metro-North and the City entered into an agreement concerning the mooring, docking, and use of facilities in Newburgh to be used for the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry.

payload.description: Initial agreement between Metro-North and the City of Newburgh concerning the mooring, docking, and use of facilities in Newburgh for the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry

evidence_refs.source_quote: August 2004, Metro-North and the City entered into an agreement concerning the mooring, docking, and use of facilities in Newburgh to be used for the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry

tool_args.label: First MOU between MNR and City of Newburgh - May 26, 2015
tool_args.raw_text: Under an MOU dated May 26, 2015, between Metro-North and the City, Metro-North reimbursed the City for lease payments from May through December 2015, at the monthly rate of $21,278.

tool_args.label: Second MOU between MNR and City of Newburgh - January 26, 2016
tool_args.raw_text: A second MOU dated January 26, 2016 extended this agreement under the same terms

payload.description: Second MOU between Metro-North and City of Newburgh extending reimbursement under same terms

evidence_refs.source_quote: a second MOU dated January 26, 2016 extended this agreement under the same terms

tool_args.label: Eighth MOU between MNR and City of Newburgh - December 14, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Eighth MOU dated December 14, 2021 whereby Metro-North agreed to reimburse the City for the rent payments made by the City under this extension at the same rate of $21,916 per month.

payload.description: Eighth MOU between Metro-North and City of Newburgh for lease reimbursement at $21,916 per month for the period January 1, 2022 through December 31, 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Eighth MOU dated December 14, 2021 whereby Metro-North agreed to reimburse the City for the rent payments made by the City under this extension at the same rate of $21,916 per month.

tool_args.label: First MOU monthly lease reimbursement rate - $21,278
tool_args.raw_text: at the monthly rate of $21,278

evidence_refs.source_quote: Under an MOU dated May 26, 2015, between Metro-North and the City, Metro-North reimbursed the City for lease payments from May through December 2015, at the monthly rate of $21,278.

tool_args.label: Second New Lease monthly rent - $21,916
tool_args.raw_text: rent payments of $21,916 per month

evidence_refs.source_quote: rent payments of $21,916 per month

tool_args.label: Ninth MOU proposed monthly reimbursement rate - $21,916
tool_args.raw_text: at the same rate of $21,916 per month.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Under the proposed Ninth MOU, Metro-North will reimburse the City for the same period of time as the Second New Lease Fourth Extension (January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2023) at the same rate of $21,916 per month.

tool_args.label: Annual CMAQ funding for Newburgh-Beacon Ferry lease - $263,000
tool_args.raw_text: Of the CMAQ funds, $263,000 will be used annually to fund the reimbursement to the City upon proof of payment of the monthly lease cost.

payload.metric_name: annual CMAQ funding for lease reimbursement

evidence_refs.source_quote: Of the CMAQ funds, $263,000 will be used annually to fund the reimbursement to the City upon proof of payment of the monthly lease cost.

tool_args.label: NYSDOT contract for lease reimbursement expired and not renewed
tool_args.raw_text: the City and the New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT) entered into a contract by which NYSDOT reimbursed the City for the rent payments under the lease; that contract expired and was not renewed by NYSDOT.

payload.claim_text: NYSDOT had a contract to reimburse the City for rent payments under the lease; that contract expired and was not renewed by NYSDOT.
payload.subject: NYSDOT reimbursement contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: the City and the New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT) entered into a contract by which NYSDOT reimbursed the City for the rent payments under the lease; that contract expired and was not renewed by NYSDOT.

tool_args.label: City of Newburgh cannot afford ferry facility lease
tool_args.raw_text: The City does not have the resources to shoulder the expense of the ferry facility property lease.

payload.claim_text: The City does not have the resources to shoulder the expense of the ferry facility property lease.
payload.subject: City of Newburgh financial capacity

evidence_refs.source_quote: The City does not have the resources to shoulder the expense of the ferry facility property lease.

tool_args.label: Risk of ferry service interruption without MOU
tool_args.raw_text: If Metro-North does not reimburse the City for the expense of leasing the ferry facility lands, the lease will terminate and the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry service will be interrupted.

payload.claim_text: If Metro-North does not reimburse the City for the expense of leasing the ferry facility lands, the lease will terminate and the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry service will be interrupted.
payload.subject: Newburgh-Beacon Ferry service continuity

evidence_refs.source_quote: If Metro-North does not reimburse the City for the expense of leasing the ferry facility lands, the lease will terminate and the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry service will be interrupted.

tool_args.label: Zero net budget impact from Ninth MOU
tool_args.raw_text: BUDGET IMPACT: Metro-North applies for reimbursement from NYSDOT as the payments are made to the City of Newburgh. There is a zero net impact on the operating budget.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North applies for reimbursement from NYSDOT as the payments are made to the City of Newburgh. There is a zero net impact on the operating budget.
payload.subject: Ninth MOU budget impact

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North applies for reimbursement from NYSDOT as the payments are made to the City of Newburgh. There is a zero net impact on the operating budget.

tool_args.label: Ninth MOU alternative site identification provision
tool_args.raw_text: The Ninth MOU also provides that the City and Metro-North will continue to work together in a diligent, cooperative and time sensitive manner to identify and make available alternative locations for the Ferry Service and parking facility, should the current site not be available in the future, as well as work together to identify possible other sources of funding.

payload.claim_text: The Ninth MOU also provides that the City and Metro-North will continue to work together in a diligent, cooperative and time sensitive manner to identify and make available alternative locations for the Ferry Service and parking facility, should the current site not be available in the future, as well as work together to identify possible other sources of funding.
payload.subject: Ninth MOU alternative locations provision

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Ninth MOU also provides that the City and Metro-North will continue to work together in a diligent, cooperative and time sensitive manner to identify and make available alternative locations for the Ferry Service and parking facility, should the current site not be available in the future, as well as work together to identify possible other sources of funding.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
